hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【FINANCE】美联储理事米歇尔·鲍曼警告不要因通胀飙升而加息；【CRYPTO】Base 在主网上推出 Azul，推动 Coinbase 的以太坊 L2 走向完全去中心化；【CRYPTO】“银行不会接受”：戴蒙在《清晰法案》辩论中升级了稳定币奖励之争。

items.title: Fed Governor Michelle Bowman warns against hiking interest rates because of inflation spike
items.summary: Bowman said reacting to the inflation surge, driven primarily by energy prices and tariffs, has proven ineffective.
items.title_zh: 美联储理事米歇尔·鲍曼警告不要因通胀飙升而加息
items.summary_zh: 鲍曼表示，对主要由能源价格和关税推动的通胀飙升做出反应已被证明是无效的。

items.title: Base launches Azul on mainnet, pushing Coinbase’s Ethereum L2 toward full decentralization
items.summary: Base has deployed its Azul upgrade on mainnet, with multiproofs and a new client stack advancing decentralization.
items.title_zh: Base 在主网上推出 Azul，推动 Coinbase 的以太坊 L2 走向完全去中心化
items.summary_zh: Base 已在主网上部署了 Azul 升级，具有多重证明和新的客户端堆栈，可推进去中心化。

items.title: ‘The banks will not accept it’: Dimon escalates battle over stablecoin rewards in CLARITY Act debate
items.summary: JPMorgan CEO Jamie Dimon criticized Coinbase CEO Brian Armstrong and warned the current CLARITY Act framework could ultimately fail, as banks and crypto firms clash over whether stablecoin issuers should be allowed to offer yield-bearing rewards that resemble bank deposits.
items.title_zh: “银行不会接受”：戴蒙在《清晰法案》辩论中升级了稳定币奖励之争
items.summary_zh: 摩根大通首席执行官杰米·戴蒙 (Jamie Dimon) 批评了 Coinbase 首席执行官布莱恩·阿姆斯特朗 (Brian Armstrong)，并警告说，当前的《澄清法案》框架最终可能会失败，因为银行和加密货币公司在是否应允许稳定币发行人提供类似于银行存款的收益奖励方面发生冲突。

items.title: Iran War Updates: Trump Puts Off ‘Final Determination’ on Iran Proposal
items.summary: The president met with aides for two hours at the White House about a possible cease-fire extension, according to a senior administration official. Earlier, Mr. Trump had suggested in a social media post that he was ready to make a decision.
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争最新动态：特朗普推迟对伊朗提案的“最终决定”
items.summary_zh: 据一位高级政府官员称，总统在白宫与助手们进行了两个小时的会面，讨论了可能延长停火的问题。此前，特朗普曾在社交媒体帖子中表示，他已准备好做出决定。

items.title: Texas appoints CleanSpark exec, bitcoin miner CEO to Strategic Bitcoin Reserve committee
items.summary: Texas is seeking a custodian to transition reserve assets from Blackrock's IBIT into direct bitcoin holdings.
items.title_zh: 德克萨斯州任命 CleanSpark 执行官、比特币矿商首席执行官为比特币战略储备委员会成员
items.summary_zh: 德克萨斯州正在寻找托管人，将储备资产从贝莱德的 IBIT 转变为直接持有的比特币。

items.title: Warp’s big bet on building open source with GPT-5.5
items.summary: Warp uses GPT-5.5 and OpenAI models to coordinate coding agents across local, cloud, and open-source development workflows.
items.title_zh: Warp 押注于使用 GPT-5.5 构建开源
items.summary_zh: Warp 使用 GPT-5.5 和 OpenAI 模型来协调本地、云和开源开发工作流程中的编码代理。

items.title: Towards Speed-of-Light Text Generation with Nemotron-Labs Diffusion Language Models
items.title_zh: 使用 Nemotron-Labs 扩散语言模型实现光速文本生成

items.title: Jamie Dimon says JPMorgan Chase could spend $20 billion on acquisition: 'We are on the lookout'
items.summary: A $20 billion deal would be among the largest in JPMorgan's history and could invite regulatory scrutiny given its position as the largest U.S. bank by assets.
items.title_zh: 杰米·戴蒙 (Jamie Dimon) 表示摩根大通可能斥资 200 亿美元进行收购：“我们正在密切关注”
items.summary_zh: 这笔 200 亿美元的交易将是摩根大通历史上规模最大的交易之一，鉴于其作为美国资产最大银行的地位，可能会引发监管审查。

items.title: Your AI agent can now trade for you on Robinhood. And buy stuff with your credit card too
items.summary: The new products allow customers to create AI assistants capable of carrying out investing strategies or spending instructions with minimal human involvement.
items.title_zh: 您的人工智能代理现在可以在 Robinhood 上为您进行交易。也可以用信用卡买东西
items.summary_zh: 新产品允许客户创建人工智能助手，能够在最少的人工参与下执行投资策略或支出指令。

items.title: Israel put on UN sexual violence in warzones blacklist for first time
items.summary: Israel says it rejects allegations in a new report by the office of the UN secretary general.
items.title_zh: 以色列首次将战区性暴力列入联合国黑名单
items.summary_zh: 以色列表示否认联合国秘书长办公室新报告中的指控。

items.title: 'Controversial' North Korean invasion setting for next Call of Duty game
items.summary: Developer Infinity Ward said the game will be "grounded in the military authenticity" the series is known for.
items.title_zh: 下一款《使命召唤》游戏的朝鲜入侵设定“有争议”
items.summary_zh: 开发商 Infinity Ward 表示，这款游戏将“植根于该系列闻名的军事真实性”。

items.title: Europe Is Edging Closer to a Trade War With China. Here’s Why.
items.summary: As cheap goods pour in, threatening the continent’s manufacturing sector, a search for solutions is becoming increasingly urgent.
items.title_zh: 欧洲正在接近与中国的贸易战。这就是为什么。
items.summary_zh: 随着廉价商品涌入，威胁到非洲大陆的制造业，寻找解决方案变得越来越紧迫。

items.title: After Orban’s Defeat, Hungary Is Poised to Get Billions From E.U.
items.summary: The European Union is set to release 16 billion euros it had withheld, as Hungary moves to enact anti-corruption and rule of law policies.
items.title_zh: 欧尔班失败后，匈牙利准备从欧盟获得数十亿美元
items.summary_zh: 随着匈牙利采取行动制定反腐败和法治政策，欧盟将释放其扣留的 160 亿欧元。

items.title: Vietnam’s Leader Warns Asia About the Risks of Superpower Conflict
items.summary: In a speech to military leaders from the region, To Lam said that distrust and a lack of respect for established rules had created a culture of “the big fish swallowing the small fish.”
items.title_zh: 越南领导人警告亚洲超级大国冲突的风险
items.summary_zh: 苏林在向该地区军事领导人发表讲话时表示，不信任和对既定规则缺乏尊重造成了“大鱼吞小鱼”的文化。

items.title: U.S. regulator says 24/7 trading is great for crypto, may not be fit for other sectors
items.summary: As the CFTC issued landmark approvals for crypto perpetual futures contracts, it explained in a related advisory that round-the-clock activity isn't right for all.
items.title_zh: 美国监管机构表示 24/7 交易非常适合加密货币，但可能不适合其他行业
items.summary_zh: 随着美国商品期货交易委员会（CFTC）对加密货币永续期货合约发出具有里程碑意义的批准，它在相关咨询中解释说，全天候活动并不适合所有人。

items.title: U.S. CFTC opens crypto 'perp' door with first approvals at Kalshi, Coinbase
items.summary: The Commodity Futures Trading Commission has now established a stance on how regulated U.S. firms can engage in crypto perpetual futures contracts.
items.title_zh: 美国商品期货交易委员会 (CFTC) 首次批准 Kalshi 和 Coinbase，开启加密货币“perp”大门
items.summary_zh: 商品期货交易委员会现已就受监管的美国公司如何参与加密货币永续期货合约确立了立场。

items.title: Paxos wins SEC approval to clear U.S. stocks on blockchain
items.summary: Paxos new license positions it alongside legacy giants such as DTCC and makes it a compelling, more efficient alternative for traditional finance giants than legacy competitors.
items.title_zh: Paxos 获得 SEC 批准在区块链上清算美国股票
items.summary_zh: Paxos 新的许可证使其与 DTCC 等传统巨头并驾齐驱，并使其成为传统金融巨头比传统竞争对手更有吸引力、更高效的替代方案。

items.title: CFTC opens door for crypto perpetual future contracts in US as Coinbase, Kalshi move forward
items.summary: The CFTC opened the doors for perpetual futures contracts, giving way for Kalshi and Coinbase to offer those products.
items.title_zh: 随着 Coinbase、Kalshi 的推进，CFTC 在美国开启了加密货币永续合约的大门
items.summary_zh: CFTC 为永续期货合约敞开了大门，为 Kalshi 和 Coinbase 提供这些产品让路。

items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #109.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：Bonk (BONK)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 109 位。

items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #16.
items.title_zh: 热门加密货币：Stellar (XLM)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 16。

items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：矮胖企鹅 (PENGU)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 104。

items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #11.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：Hyperliquid (HYPE)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 11。

items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #25.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：Hedera (HBAR)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 25 位。

items.title: How Endava builds an agentic organization with Codex
items.summary: Learn how Endava uses Codex to build an agentic organization, accelerating software delivery and reducing requirements analysis from weeks to hours.
items.title_zh: Endava 如何利用 Codex 建立代理组织
items.summary_zh: 了解 Endava 如何使用 Codex 构建代理组织、加速软件交付并将需求分析从数周缩短至数小时。

items.title: Cisco and OpenAI redefine enterprise engineering with Codex
items.summary: Cisco and OpenAI are redefining enterprise engineering with Codex, helping Cisco scale AI-native development, accelerate AI Defense work, and automate defect remediation.
items.title_zh: 思科和 OpenAI 通过 Codex 重新定义企业工程
items.summary_zh: 思科和 OpenAI 正在通过 Codex 重新定义企业工程，帮助思科扩展 AI 原生开发、加速 AI 防御工作并自动执行缺陷修复。

items.title: Specialization Beats Scale: A Strategic Variable Most AI Procurement Decisions Overlook
items.title_zh: 专业化战胜规模：大多数人工智能采购决策忽视的战略变量

items.title: Technology usually creates jobs for young, skilled workers. Will AI do the same?
items.summary: A new study of the postwar U.S. shows which kinds of workers historically filled new tech-enabled jobs.
items.title_zh: 技术通常会为年轻的技术工人创造就业机会。人工智能也会这么做吗？
items.summary_zh: 一项针对战后美国的新研究显示了历史上哪些类型的工人担任了新技术支持的工作。

items.title: Games people — and machines — play: Untangling strategic reasoning to advance AI
items.summary: Assistant Professor Gabriele Farina mines the foundations of decision-making in complex multi-agent scenarios.
items.title_zh: 人和机器玩的游戏：理清战略推理以推进人工智能
items.summary_zh: 助理教授 Gabriele Farina 挖掘复杂多智能体场景中决策的基础。

items.title: Nio shares jump 10% after releasing first flagship EV in more than two years
items.summary: Chinese electric car company Nio has launched two lower-priced brands in the last two years to broaden its customer base in a sluggish Chinese consumer market.
items.title_zh: 两年多来发布首款旗舰电动汽车后，蔚来股价上涨 10%
items.summary_zh: 中国电动汽车公司蔚来在过去两年推出了两个低价品牌，以在低迷的中国消费市场中扩大客户群。

items.title: Trump’s Boat Strikes Have Failed to Curb Cocaine Flow to U.S., Experts Say
items.summary: Despite the rising body count off the South American coast, researchers say cocaine is as easy to get in many parts of the United States as it was before the strikes began.
items.title_zh: 专家称，特朗普的船只袭击未能遏制可卡因流入美国
items.summary_zh: 研究人员表示，尽管南美海岸附近的死亡人数不断上升，但可卡因在美国许多地区仍然像袭击开始前一样容易获取。

items.title: Live markets: Bitcoin shrugs off early decline, but two-month winning streak is in jeopardy
items.summary: A hopeful posting on Iran from President Trump helped erase morning losses.
items.title_zh: 实时市场：比特币摆脱了早期下跌的影响，但两个月的连涨势头面临危险
items.summary_zh: 特朗普总统在伊朗问题上发表的充满希望的帖子帮助消除了上午的损失。

items.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: Bittensor (TAO) drops 4%, leading index lower
items.summary: Internet Computer (ICP), down 3.8%, was also an underperformer.
items.title_zh: CoinDesk 20 业绩更新：Bittensor (TAO) 下跌 4%，领先指数走低
items.summary_zh: 互联网计算机 (ICP) 也表现不佳，下跌 3.8%。

items.title: Strengthening societal resilience with Rosalind Biodefense
items.summary: OpenAI launches Rosalind Biodefense, expanding trusted access to GPT-Rosalind for vetted developers and U.S. government partners advancing biodefense, public health, and pandemic preparedness through frontier AI.
items.title_zh: 通过 Rosalind Biodefense 增强社会复原力
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 推出 Rosalind Biodefense，为经过审查的开发人员和美国政府合作伙伴扩大对 GPT-Rosalind 的可信访问，通过前沿 AI 推进生物防御、公共卫生和大流行病防范。

items.title: A shared playbook for trustworthy third party evaluations
items.summary: OpenAI shares guidance on third-party AI evaluations, covering how to assess model capabilities, safeguards, and validity for frontier systems.
items.title_zh: 值得信赖的第三方评估的共享手册
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 分享了第三方人工智能评估指南，涵盖如何评估前沿系统的模型能力、保障措施和有效性。

items.title: ITBench-AA: Frontier Models Score Below 50% on the First Benchmark for Agentic Enterprise IT Tasks — by Artificial Analysis and IBM
items.title_zh: ITBench-AA：在代理企业 IT 任务的第一个基准测试中，前沿模型的得分低于 50% — 由人工分析和 IBM 提供

items.title: OlmoEarth v1.1: A more efficient family of Earth observation models
items.title_zh: OlmoEarth v1.1：更高效的地球观测模型系列

items.title: 100 things we announced at I/O 2026
items.summary: We've been busy! Here’s a rundown of the top announcements, launches and demos at I/O 2026.
items.title_zh: 我们在 I/O 2026 上宣布的 100 件事
items.summary_zh: 我们一直很忙！以下是 I/O 2026 上最重要的公告、发布和演示的摘要。

items.title: How AI Mode is changing the way people search in the U.S.
items.summary: One year after launch, see how AI Mode’s users are shifting from keywords to natural language queries.
items.title_zh: AI 模式如何改变美国人们的搜索方式
items.summary_zh: 发布一年后，看看 AI 模式的用户如何从关键字转向自然语言查询。

items.title: New ways to create and get things done in Google Workspace
items.summary: Announcing new voice capabilities in Gmail, Docs and Keep, a new design tool called Google Pics and updates to AI Inbox.
items.title_zh: 在 Google Workspace 中创建和完成工作的新方法
items.summary_zh: 宣布 Gmail、Docs 和 Keep 中的新语音功能、名为 Google Pics 的新设计工具以及 AI Inbox 的更新。

items.title: Building AI models that understand chemical principles
items.summary: Connor Coley works at the interface of chemistry and machine learning, to discover and design new drug compounds.
items.title_zh: 构建理解化学原理的人工智能模型
items.summary_zh: Connor Coley 致力于化学和机器学习的结合，发现和设计新的药物化合物。

items.title: Beacon Biosignals is mapping the brain during sleep
items.summary: Founded by Jake Donoghue PhD ’19 and former MIT researcher Jarrett Revels, the company is creating an AI-driven platform to help diagnose and treat disease.
items.title_zh: Beacon Biosignals 正在绘制睡眠期间的大脑图
items.summary_zh: 该公司由 Jake Donoghue 博士 '19 和前麻省理工学院研究员 Jarrett Revels 创立，正在创建一个人工智能驱动的平台来帮助诊断和治疗疾病。

items.title: CFTC sues Rhode Island over actions against prediction markets
items.summary: It marks the seventh state the commission has sued in a dispute over who has the right to regulate event contract platforms.
items.title_zh: 美国商品期货交易委员会 (CFTC) 起诉罗德岛州针对预测市场的行为
items.summary_zh: 这是该委员会在谁有权监管赛事合约平台的争议中起诉的第七个州。

items.title: Gaming association says states have lost $1 billion in tax revenue due to prediction markets
items.summary: Bill Miller, American Gaming Association president and CEO, added that prediction market platforms in his view amount to "backdoor sports betting."
items.title_zh: 博彩协会称各州因预测市场损失了 10 亿美元的税收
items.summary_zh: 美国博彩协会主席兼首席执行官比尔·米勒补充说，他认为预测市场平台相当于“后门体育博彩”。

items.title: Google employee charged with $1M Polymarket insider trading bet on search term
items.summary: The complaint from the Southern District of New York comes just over a month after another insider trading case on Polymarket.
items.title_zh: 谷歌员工被控在 Polymarket 搜索词上进行 100 万美元内幕交易
items.summary_zh: 纽约南区的投诉是在 Polymarket 发生另一起内幕交易案件一个多月后发出的。

items.title: Traders are skeptical of Iran timeline for Strait of Hormuz reopening
items.summary: Despite reports Iran could return the passageway to normal traffic flows within a month of a peace deal, Kalshi traders thought that was unlikely.
items.title_zh: 交易商对伊朗重新开放霍尔木兹海峡的时间表持怀疑态度
items.summary_zh: 尽管有报道称伊朗可能会在和平协议签署后一个月内使该通道恢复正常交通，但卡尔什贸易商认为这不太可能。

items.title: Taiwan chip stocks climb after Nvidia announces $150 billion spending plans
items.summary: Mainland China-based chip giants such as Cambricon saw their shares tumble on Wednesday.
items.title_zh: 英伟达宣布 1500 亿美元支出计划后，台湾芯片股上涨
items.summary_zh: 寒武纪等中国大陆芯片巨头的股价周三暴跌。

items.title: China industrial profits jump 24.7% in April, fastest gain in over two years despite headwinds
items.summary: China’s industrial profits grew at their fastest pace in over two years in April, buoyed by stronger exports, higher producer prices and gains in upstream industries.
items.title_zh: 尽管面临阻力，中国 4 月份工业利润增长 24.7%，创两年多来最快增幅
items.summary_zh: 受出口强劲、生产者价格上涨和上游产业增长的推动，4月份中国工业利润增速创两年多来最快。

items.title: 'Poison seller' who sold toxic chemicals online to people across world admits aiding suicides
items.summary: Kenneth Law admitted charges relating to Canadian victims - but families say he should also be charged in the UK over 79 deaths in Britain.
items.title_zh: 在网上向世界各地的人们出售有毒化学品的“毒贩”承认帮助自杀
items.summary_zh: 肯尼思·劳 (Kenneth Law) 承认了与​​加拿大受害者有关的指控，但家人表示，他也应该因英国 79 人死亡而在英国受到指控。

items.title: Nato and EU condemn Russia after drone hits Romanian residential block
items.summary: Romania says the Russian drone was likely hit over Ukraine by its air defences and altered its trajectory.
items.title_zh: 无人机袭击罗马尼亚住宅区后北约和欧盟谴责俄罗斯
items.summary_zh: 罗马尼亚表示，俄罗斯无人机很可能在乌克兰上空被乌克兰防空系统击中，并改变了飞行轨迹。

items.title: No deal announced after Trump meeting to make 'final determination' on Iran
items.summary: The US president met his advisers, after officials confirmed the US and Iran had agreed a framework of a deal.
items.title_zh: 特朗普会面就伊朗问题做出“最终决定”后未宣布任何协议
items.summary_zh: 在官员确认美国和伊朗已就协议框架达成一致后，美国总统会见了他的顾问。

items.title: First of five men found alive in flooded Laos cave rescued
items.summary: The bedraggled man was led to safety by rescuers after nine days stranded in the cavern
items.title_zh: 老挝被洪水淹没的洞穴中发现的五名幸存者中的第一人获救
items.summary_zh: 这名浑身脏兮兮的男子在洞穴里被困九天后被救援人员带到安全地带

items.title: Ghana parliament passes anti-LGBTQ+ bill
items.summary: Same-sex acts are punishable by jail terms under Ghana's new bill targeting those identifying as gay, lesbian or transgender.
items.title_zh: 加纳议会通过反 LGBTQ+ 法案
items.summary_zh: 根据加纳针对男同性恋、女同性恋或跨性别者的新法案，同性性行为可被判处监禁。

items.title: Exploding rocket casts doubts over Nasa's Moon plans
items.summary: Explosion of Blue Origin rocket is a setback for the company and for Nasa's Moon plans.
items.title_zh: 火箭爆炸让人们对美国宇航局登月计划产生怀疑
items.summary_zh: 蓝色起源火箭的爆炸对该公司和美国宇航局的月球计划来说都是一次挫折。

items.title: Former US attorney general Pam Bondi defends her handling of Epstein files in congressional probe
items.summary: The testimony comes about a month after America's top prosecutor was ousted by US President Donald Trump.
items.title_zh: 美国前司法部长帕姆·邦迪在国会调查中为她对爱泼斯坦文件的处理进行了辩护
items.summary_zh: 该证词是在美国最高检察官被美国总统唐纳德·特朗普罢免一个月后发表的。

items.title: Eight students arrested in Kenya after suspected deadly school arson attack
items.summary: Sixteen pupils died in the fire that ripped through a dormitory while they were asleep.
items.title_zh: 肯尼亚涉嫌致命学校纵火袭击，八名学生被捕
items.summary_zh: 十六名学生在睡觉时吞噬宿舍的大火中丧生。

items.title: Russian Drone Hits Romanian Apartment Building, Officials Say
items.summary: Romania is a NATO country, and the security alliance condemned “Russia’s recklessness” for an episode that sharply escalated tensions with Moscow.
items.title_zh: 官员称俄罗斯无人机击中罗马尼亚公寓楼
items.summary_zh: 罗马尼亚是北约国家，该安全联盟谴责“俄罗斯的鲁莽行为”，导致与莫斯科的紧张局势急剧升级。

items.title: France’s Far Right Has 2 Leaders. They Don’t Always Have One Voice.
items.summary: Marine Le Pen and her protégé, Jordan Bardella, lead presidential polls. They are united on curbing immigration but split recently on economic policy.
items.title_zh: 法国极右翼有两位领导人。他们并不总是有一种声音。
items.summary_zh: 玛丽娜·勒庞和她的门徒乔丹·巴尔德拉在总统选举中领先。他们在限制移民问题上意见一致，但最近在经济政策上出现分歧。

items.title: No, Not That Georgia. A.I. Compounds a Nation’s Identity Woes.
items.summary: Online queries are more likely to turn up references to the U.S. state — a problem for the republic in the Caucasus and its people. But a move to drop the name “Georgia” has lost steam.
items.title_zh: 不，不是那个乔治亚州。人工智能。加剧国家的身份认同困境。
items.summary_zh: 在线查询更有可能出现对美国政府的提及——这对高加索共和国及其人民来说是一个问题。但放弃“乔治亚”这个名字的举措已经失去了动力。

items.title: Court in Kenya Suspends Plans for U.S. Ebola Quarantine Unit
items.summary: The order came after U.S. officials said that a 50-bed facility was being established in the African country to house American citizens exposed to the virus.
items.title_zh: 肯尼亚法院暂停美国埃博拉检疫中心的计划
items.summary_zh: 此前，美国官员表示，非洲国家正在建立一个拥有 50 个床位的设施，用于安置感染该病毒的美国公民。

items.title: Kenya Arrests 8 Students After Fire at School Dorm Kills 16
items.summary: The students could be charged next week, Kenya’s education minister said, after the blaze broke out on Thursday at a school run by Kenya’s police.
items.title_zh: 学校宿舍火灾造成16人死亡，肯尼亚逮捕8名学生
items.summary_zh: 周四肯尼亚警方开办的一所学校发生火灾后，肯尼亚教育部长表示，这些学生可能会在下周受到指控。

items.title: Mass deployment of AI agents is a disaster waiting to happen, says CertiK CEO
items.summary: Ronghui Gu shares tips on how to isolate AI agents while testing them so they do not have access to critical personal information or digital assets.
items.title_zh: CertiK 首席执行官表示，大规模部署人工智能代理是一场即将发生的灾难
items.summary_zh: 顾荣辉分享了如何在测试人工智能代理时对其进行隔离的技巧，以便他们无法访问关键的个人信息或数字资产。

items.title: Clarity Act Risks Regulation Without Oversight, Brookings Fellow Says
items.summary: As Congress weighs crypto legislation, Aaron Klein says the CFTC needs more resources, independence and coordination to oversee digital markets.
items.title_zh: 布鲁金斯学会研究员表示，《澄清法案》存在缺乏监督的监管风险
items.summary_zh: 在国会权衡加密立法之际，亚伦·克莱因 (Aaron Klein) 表示，美国商品期货交易委员会 (CFTC) 需要更多的资源、独立性和协调来监督数字市场。

items.title: What American crypto asset perpetuals mean for the future of crypto
items.summary: For years, one of the most significant crypto asset markets has existed entirely outside the United States. Today, that changes, explains CFTC Chairman Selig.
items.title_zh: 美国加密资产永续对加密货币的未来意味着什么
items.summary_zh: 多年来，最重要的加密资产市场之一完全存在于美国境外。美国商品期货交易委员会主席塞利格解释说，如今情况发生了变化。

items.title: Hyperliquid bigger than NASDAQ, says ICE CEO Jeffrey Sprecher
items.summary: Sprecher saluted Hyperliquid's team, signaling deeper engagement between Wall Street incumbents and crypto-native rails.
items.title_zh: ICE 首席执行官杰弗里·斯普雷彻 (Jeffrey Sprecher) 表示，超流动性比纳斯达克还大
items.summary_zh: Sprecher 向 Hyperliquid 的团队致敬，这表明华尔街老牌企业与加密货币原生铁路之间的接触更加深入。

items.title: US has seized nearly $1 billion in crypto from Iran, Bessent says
items.summary: Earlier this year, Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said the U.S. had seized "nearly $500 million" in Iranian crypto assets.
items.title_zh: Bessent 表示，美国从伊朗查获了近 10 亿美元的加密货币
items.summary_zh: 今年早些时候，财政部长斯科特·贝森特表示，美国扣押了“近 5 亿美元”的伊朗加密资产。

items.title: JPMorgan CEO Jamie Dimon blasts Coinbase’s Brian Armstrong, plans to fight Clarity Act
items.summary: Dimon said Coinbase's Armstrong is spending hundreds of millions of dollars trying to get Clarity Act passed.
items.title_zh: 摩根大通首席执行官杰米·戴蒙 (Jamie Dimon) 抨击 Coinbase 的布莱恩·阿姆斯特朗 (Brian Armstrong)，计划反对《澄清法案》
items.summary_zh: 戴蒙表示，Coinbase 的阿姆斯特朗正在花费数亿美元试图让《澄清法案》获得通过。

items.title: Sui blockchain suffers more downtime following Thursday’s six-hour outage
items.summary: Sui was offline for 5 hours and 55 minutes on Thursday due to a bug in the blockchain's latest "1.72 release."
items.title_zh: 在周四的六小时中断之后，Sui 区块链遭受了更多的停机时间
items.summary_zh: 由于区块链最新的“1.72 版本”中的错误，Sui 周四离线了 5 小时 55 分钟。

items.title: Aave Labs secures dual UK licenses for regulated crypto payments infrastructure through local subsidiary
items.summary: Aave Labs has obtained FCA cryptoasset registration in the U.K. for its Push subsidiaries, unlocking zero-fee fiat on-ramps.
items.title_zh: Aave Labs 通过当地子公司获得英国受监管加密支付基础设施的双重许可证
items.summary_zh: Aave Labs 已为其 Push 子公司在英国获得了 FCA 加密资产注册，解锁了零费用的法币入口。

items.title: Ventuals to compensate traders after pre-IPO SpaceX perps plunge 45% on Hyperliquid
items.summary: Ventuals to compensate traders after faulty oracle data sent SPACEX perps down 45% on Hyperliquid, wiping $1.51 million.

items.title: ‘First and only’: Paxos secures SEC registration as clearing and settlement agency
items.summary: Paxos said it is the first and only blockchain-native firm to be registered as a clearing agency under the SEC.

items.summary_zh: Paxos 表示，它是第一家也是唯一一家在 SEC 注册为清算机构的区块链本土公司。

items.summary: With $25 million investment from the Commonwealth of Massachusetts, MIT to build a new shared-use facility to serve as a statewide quantum toolbox.

items.summary: New AI education program from MIT Open Learning debuts with AI-powered personalization and a free introductory course for learners everywhere.

items.title: Study: Firms often use automation to control certain workers’ wages
items.summary: MIT economists found US companies tend to target employees earning a “wage premium,” which increases inequality but not necessarily productivity.

items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院的经济学家发现，美国公司倾向于以赚取“工资溢价”的员工为目标，这会增加不平等，但不一定会提高生产率。
